UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C & O REALTY CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRIPI, SEAN HOMRAN, JASON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 990 GEARY ST #206, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE - CRC 522 INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES- CCP 415.46.
